title: Creen´s Recipes
description: Data pack to add crafting recipes from the Mega Showdown mod, as well as rebalancing others to make them easier to obtain.
body:
The Creen's Recipes datapack adds a bunch of new recipes for the Cobblemon Mega Showdown Mod. As well as allowing you to duplicate and uncraft hard-to-obtain items, it also adds a couple of new crafting recipes for rebalanced base Cobblemon items.
The mod adds crafting recipes for items that couldn't be crafted in the base Mega Showdown.

**Legend Plate:** Any of the 18 elementary tables, use at least 9 of them
![Legend Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d83dfd727e3a82e1d8d67a942e6c36cd02bd06a.png)

**Any Elemental Plates:** Gold blocks, gems of the corresponding type, and a diamond
![Flame Plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d6cdc7d41bf8bca4fb619a4a4994f4ba16cf3a1.png)

**Adamant Orb/Crystal:** Dragon Gems, Steel and the Orb; place the Adamant Crystal in a stonecutter to undo
![Adamant Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7318c96a6e8fb2d4579c5fe07211948bfb8c8908.png)
![Adamant Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e11915f12e67712e991519b3a1ac584db89110.png)

**Lustrous Orb/Globe:** Dragon gems, water, and the orb; place the Lustrous Globe in a stonecutter to undo
![Lustrous Globe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fb22a6ff25832b3f7d598f4816f413a9fafb4a4.png)
![Lustrous Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced9b77c72f8c339b90fa5f78249f4dafaf2a9e6.png)

**Griseous Orb/Core:** Dragon Gems, gosth Gems, and Orb; place the Griseous Core in a Stonecutter to undo
![Griseous Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a53aff488c76fe5fc601868bee34fddaef391f76.png)
![Griseous Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0231748316d51906f30b8bb9a2326f72b952086e.png)

**Red Orb:** Fire Gems and Mega Meteorid Radiated Block
![Red Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc686eb6dfbb32c9b3e40d8eb19ea03c4fdc9a3.png)

**Blue Orb:** Water Gems and Mega Meteorid Radiated Block
![Blue Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d2cf49d13c3ebac3cd19622ac9d74eb378394b.png)

**Star Core:** Wishing Star, netherite scraps and maxi mushroom
![Star Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e86069b710449ed24044e6f0932badecc2bdee70.png)

**Zygarde Cells/Core:** 9 cells make 1 core, and 1 core makes 9 cells
![Zygarde Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f946429de3b76ecf6cfb727e4503148c05f83a.png)
![Zygarde Cells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13235f0d5e511d65fa76ae9103d103a092146f66.png)

**Keystone/ Uncraft Mega Bracalet:** Keystone, Mega Meteorid Radiated Block, Mega Meteorid Block
![Duplied Keystone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8549d2d2dfb90a1a0e55fd6ddd98c2e099684f88.png)
![Uncraft Keystone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b905f882ce853fdeab9582a79ad737776a58811.png)

**Duplied Mega Stone:** Mega Stone, Mega Meteorid Radiated Block, Mega Meteorid Block
![Duplied Mega Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae88f707e0cb398269f172f5e91a338a72fa0ff9.png)
**Emptying Mega Stone:** Any Mega Stone                                                  
![Emptying Mega Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aeb5f7f47288a3b5a0f58d871e30eba51d20781.png)

**Light Sparkling Stone/Uncraft Z Ring:** Smooth Stone, Iron and Light Sparkling Stone
![Light Sparkling Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45bbad876af895c425022849ea23e692b66734c.png)
![Uncraft Z ring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b93fae7fad54fc161d8504c4f7d35b54df033df.png)

**Dark Sparkling Stone/Uncraft Z Ring:** Polished black stone, Iron and Dark Sparkling Stone
![Dark Sparkling Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399c7c0cdb41d5d1d0d975c28d9f60bbef6041d5.png)
![Uncraft Z dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/325e6749d0f4c0ec5e3986ca1ace47b81a70b66d.png)

**Blank-Z:** Blank z, netherite scraps and amethyst shards
![Blank-Z](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c66cdab5ef7dbff8e34c4c397bd76c1b26f547b2.png)

**Wishing Star:** Uncraft the Dynamax-Band, duplicate it using Redstone Dust, Amethyst Block, and Gold Ingot
![Wishing Star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b92b309092b9aca9decf5c5e9d1d6095c728629.png)

**Power Spot:** Duplicate with stone, amethyst shards and power spot
![Power Spot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/185ecbbf441922d817a619756ff80a7cd2fdb420.png)

**Stellar Shards:** Any type shards, at least 9                      
![Stellar Shards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86eaa3fc31396ed5227c50cb9a809f61eb40df25.png)

**Deoxys Meteorite:** Amethyst fragments, Mega meteorid block, and Deoxys meteorite
![Deoxys Meteorite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ca9381cb945d4e2b30ee209c6445fbee4a6d201.png)

**Scrolls of Water/Darkness:** Black Belt, paper and water/dusk stone
![Scroll of Waters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca228aa33c3814ef80a7da9ebdaa2a8fe920c735.png)
![Scroll of Darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6a8a48b5190184e16c94c3d4cd56b6d49f78759.png)

**Master Ball/Ancient Origin Ball:** Shulker shell, netherite scraps and white/red apricorn
![Master Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aeba02c4268aba3fa2d5aecd220df205d84df0f.png)
![Ancient Origin Ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a123cdd97326a72e1eba9b33220b505759f7f8ea.png)
